text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, December 21. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
